\section{Requirements Specification}

\subsection{Requirements Table}

\begin{table}[h]
    \centering
    \small
    \begin{tabular}{@{}lllp{8cm}@{}}
        \toprule
        \textbf{ID} & \textbf{Type} & \textbf{Priority} & \textbf{Description} \\ \midrule
        01 & Functional & High & The system must generate visible Chladni patterns using sand or powder on the plate. \\
        02 & Functional & Medium & Implementation of synchronized lighting for visual effect. \\
        03 & Interface & High & The PR subsystem must expose a control interface for the HI subsystem. \\
        04 & Non-Functional & Medium & The hardware must support continuous use without overheating the transducers. \\ \bottomrule
    \end{tabular}
    \caption{SWAID-PR Project Requirements Table}
\end{table}
